description: You are a quality engineer at a precision machining company. A CAD file has been flagged during quality review because the dimensional constraints in the drawing do not match the approved design specification. Correct the constraints in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/panel_wrong_dims.slvs to match the approved specification document on the desktop and save the corrected file as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/panel_corrected.slvs.
